name: Crab Monterey
recipeIngredient: 2 packages frozen chopped spinach (10 oz each)
2 packages frozen chopped turnip greens or spinach (10 oz each)
1 dash Thai pepper or Cayenne pepper
8 ounces artichoke hearts, drained and quartered
Hearts of palm work well too
6 ounces crab meat, drained and flaked
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the frozen spinach in a 10-cup shallow microwave-safe casserole dish.
2. Sprinkle with instant chicken broth.
3. Cover with wax paper.
4. Microwave for 10 minutes, rotating the dish halfway through and stirring once.
5. Drain well and stir in the sour cream and Cayenne pepper.
6. Arrange artichoke hearts and crab on top.
7. Dot with butter.
8. Cover again with wax paper.
9. Microwave on high for an additional 5 minutes, or until heated through.
